SMILE INDEX: 54
WINDOW: 778.467s to 816.433s (smile at 798.467s to 801.433s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: summer, we arranged summer camps. First, I arranged the summer camp for our state only. And we went in the mountains. And I was in charge of the camp-- about 400, 500 young boys and girls. And we spent four weeks in the mountains in the camp. After this camp in July, in August, we had the camp for all Poland, for all members in Poland in the mountains, in the Tatra Mountains. This was on

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
four weeks in the mountains
